Training & Placement Cell

At UGIP Nainital, we don't just provide degrees; we build careers.

The Training and Placement (T&P) Cell acts as a vital bridge between our students and the corporate world. We provide continuous career guidance, professional training, and extensive internship opportunities to ensure our graduates are day-one ready for the industry.

Our dedicated team works tirelessly to organize campus recruitment drives, industry visits, and expert guest lectures throughout the academic year.

Soft Skills Training
Mock Interviews
Industrial Visits

Our Recruitment Process

We follow a structured 4-step process to ensure a seamless hiring experience for both recruiters and our students.

1

Pre-Placement Talk

Companies introduce their work culture, job roles, and growth opportunities to the aspiring candidates on campus.

2

Skill Assessment

Students undergo written aptitude tests, technical rounds, and coding challenges tailored to the recruiter's needs.

3

Personal Interviews

Shortlisted candidates participate in one-on-one technical and HR interviews to assess their fit and expertise.

4

Offer Issuance

Final selection results are declared, and appointment letters are issued to the successful candidates.
